q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is target.write_text() on a local file path (line 82); filesystem writes are side effects but not inherently dangerous in a controlled test environment.

q2_observable_after_return.evidence: Cleartext SSN and credit card data are persisted to disk in BASE_EXPORT_DIR; the file contents can be inspected after the function returns.

q3_result_in_memory.evidence: returns.exprs shows JsonResponse({'path': str(target)}) which only contains the file path, not the sensitive file contents themselves.
